lang.controls_txt: To setup controls, click on the action to change, then choose a key on your keyboard.
lang.bonus_txt: While exploring the map, you will meet different types of bonus items :
lang.bonus_energy_txt: Grab energy capsules whenever possible to maintain your energy.
lang.bonus_weapon_txt: Grab weapon upgrades to increase your shooting power.
lang.arrow_txt: Follow the arrows on the ground, they indicate the way to the end of the level.
lang.radar_txt: The radar indicates dinosaurs (dark green sections) and dinos eggs (beige sections)
lang.final_txt: You won! Your Dino Attack team has defeated the prehistoric invaders!
lang.message_weapon: WEAPONS SYSTEM UPGRADE : KEEP SHOOT PRESSED TO CHARGE WEAPONS
lang.text1: Powerful mutant dinosaurs with strange powers have attacked major cities! Authorities are helpless to stop their rampage as they overrun all who oppose them. The fate of the world now rests in the hands of a crack team of heroes who dare to oppose these prehistoric invaders.
lang.text2: Using cutting-edge technology and high-powered vehicles, this special squad must defend the globe against the savage might of the dinosaurs. Brave heroes with ultra-modern machines vs. a mind-staggering menace out of time in the ultimate battle for mankind's survival!
